_readme: FlightWatch Pro — Edit this file to configure your routes, alerts, and API keys.

apis._note_serpapi: SerpAPI powers the Google Flights data (most accurate, includes all fees). Get a key at https://serpapi.com — free trial available, paid plans from ~$50/mo for 5,000 searches.
apis._note_amadeus: Amadeus is a secondary data source (cross-validation). Free at https://developers.amadeus.com — 2,000 free API calls/month on the test environment.

email._note: Gmail is used to send reports. 'from' must be a Gmail address. 'app_password' is a 16-character App Password — NOT your regular Gmail password. See setup guide.

_note_always_send: Set to true to receive a report on every run. Set to false to only email when an alert triggers.

credit_cards._note: Enter your current point balances. Set a card to 0 to hide it from reports.

routes._comment: ── ROUTE 1: Example — Multiple NYC-area airports to Los Angeles ──
routes._note_origins: List as many origin airports as you want — all will be checked and compared.
routes._note_threshold: Alert if price drops AT OR BELOW this dollar amount.
routes._note_pct_drop: Alert if price drops this % below the 30-day average (needs 3+ readings to activate).

routes._comment: ── ROUTE 2: Example — One-way trip, single origin ──
